verdict_reasoning: B4GALT1 is a type II single-pass TM protein canonically resident in trans-Golgi cisternae. However, a well-documented cell-surface pool exists: UniProt/GeneCards cite PubMed:1714903 showing it is 'mainly localized at the plasma membrane,' and the processed cell-surface form acts as a recognition molecule in cell–cell and cell–matrix interactions. On sperm, it is an externally oriented integral PM component restricted to the germline/reproductive lineage. The dual Golgi-dominant + PM-minority topology with germline restriction qualifies as contextual dual_localization.
